overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street in a game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), transitioning from an open-air commercial district with neon signage and elevated highways to a covered walkway beneath an overpass. The scene features dense urban architecture, futuristic vehicles, and diverse pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with elevated highway and neon billboards

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the multi-lane street to the right
passing a pedestrian in a yellow jacket walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, observing the street and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow jacket and pink skirt walking toward the camera
futuristic green sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard with monochrome advertisement on building facade
massive concrete and steel overpass structure spanning the street ahead
vertical digital billboard with 'EL GUAPO' text and portrait on building
multi-story teal-green building with graffiti and neon signage
tall metal pole with traffic signals and lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunny day in a dense cyberpunk commercial district. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles. Prominent neon billboards and a massive elevated highway structure dominate the view ahead, while the 'El Guapo' advertisement is visible on the right building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching covered walkway under elevated highway

events.description: debris and discarded furniture appear along the right side of the sidewalk
entering the shadow cast by the elevated highway structure, light becomes dimmer

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk, approaching the darker covered area under the overpass

notable_agents.action: child in pink shorts walking ahead of the camera
person sitting on the ground near the debris pile

entered.detail: red neon sign for 'Fuyutsuki' store becoming visible on the left building
pile of discarded furniture, boxes, and trash along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking toward the massive overpass structure ahead. The 'Fuyutsuki' store sign becomes visible on the left, while debris and discarded furniture line the right side of the sidewalk. The lighting gradually dims as the camera approaches the shadow of the elevated highway, transitioning from bright daylight to a more sheltered environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with storefronts

events.description: fully entering the covered walkway beneath the elevated highway with artificial overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway, passing under the elevated highway structure with artificial lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue backpack and bright pink pants walking ahead

entered.detail: digital signage and advertisements mounted underneath the overpass structure
concrete underside of the elevated highway forming a ceiling with fluorescent lighting
external AC units and industrial equipment mounted on the left building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deep into the covered walkway beneath the elevated highway. The environment is now sheltered with mixed lighting from overhead fluorescent fixtures and the entrance behind. The 'Fuyutsuki' storefront is prominent on the left, while digital signs hang from the overpass above. The scene maintains a steady flow of pedestrians walking through this covered urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense cyberpunk commercial district that transitions from a bright, open-air street into a sheltered urban corridor. It begins on a sunny sidewalk passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles, with the El Guapo advertisement visible on a building facade beneath a massive elevated highway. As the camera advances toward the overpass, the Fuyutsuki store sign appears on the left while the lighting gradually dims, shifting from brilliant daylight to deep shadow. The scene then moves fully beneath the highway structure, where the environment transforms into a covered walkway illuminated by overhead fluorescent fixtures and hanging digital signs. Finally, the camera maintains its steady pace through this sheltered corridor, passing a flow of pedestrians beneath the heavy concrete architecture.
